creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 148923
Updated shar file for new multimedia/mediabrowser port

Thanks John. I have removed the @dir entries from pkg-plist (they were auto-created by makeplist and I assumed that behaviour was correct with the recent changes). My testing has shown they were not required as you said. I also ran portlint to iron-out a few minor wrinkles.

I do not have access to a poudriere environment at the moment, so I am not able to attach the logs sorry.

Reminder: User mediabrowser and Group mediabrowser will need to be added to UIDs and GIDs files
